title: Log entry normalization & field aliases
activityDetail: verification passed — all 4 criteria confirmed independently

criteria.description: ts, time, @timestamp are recognized as timestamp aliases
criteria.evidence: TestLP5_AC1_TimestampAliases passes for ts, time, @timestamp — all resolve to Timestamp, none leak to Extra

verification.evidence: timestampAliases map contains ts/time/@timestamp (parser.go:30-35). TestLP5_AC1_TimestampAliases runs 3 subtests, each constructing JSON with the alias, parsing, and asserting Timestamp is set and alias excluded from Extra. All pass.

criteria.description: lvl, severity are recognized as level aliases
criteria.evidence: TestLP5_AC2_LevelAliases passes for lvl, severity — both resolve to Level, none leak to Extra

verification.evidence: levelAliases map contains lvl/severity (parser.go:38-42). TestLP5_AC2_LevelAliases runs 2 subtests verifying Level field populated and alias excluded from Extra. All pass.

criteria.description: msg is recognized as a message alias
criteria.evidence: TestLP5_AC3_MessageAlias passes — msg resolves to Message, does not leak to Extra

verification.evidence: messageAliases map contains msg (parser.go:45-48). TestLP5_AC3_MessageAlias constructs JSON with msg field, verifies Message populated and msg excluded from Extra. Pass.

criteria.description: RFC 3339, Unix epoch seconds, and Unix epoch millis timestamps are parsed correctly
criteria.evidence: TestLP6_AC4_TimestampFormats (4 subtests) and TestLP6_AC4_EpochMillisSubSecond pass — RFC3339, epoch sec, epoch ms all parsed correctly with sub-second precision

verification.evidence: parseTimestamp (parser.go:58-76) handles string (RFC3339) and float64 (>1e12 = millis, else seconds). TestLP6_AC4_TimestampFormats tests all 3 formats plus millis-with-remainder. TestLP6_AC4_EpochMillisSubSecond verifies sub-second precision (123ms). All 5 subtests pass.

verificationReports.summary: All 4 acceptance criteria independently verified. Pre-flight clean: build, test, vet, gofmt all pass. Code quality: 3 unique debug numbers, Go doc comments on all exports, no external deps, no TODOs. Tests are non-tautological (construct real JSON, parse, assert on struct fields). Alias maps correctly exclude recognized fields from Extra.
